model: v5 BEN-CALIBRATED: panel DC = nameplate x0.77 (Voltaic P105 measured 3.85W panel-side full sun, ADR0026 2026-06-29) x playa-excess heat (NOCT calc / 0.93 bench ref) x dust 0.95, x geometric POA w/ frac^2x0.75-partial shading. Battery-side daily = x0.63 (P126 field-cycle ledger Jul 11: 9.02Wh input -> 5.7Wh cell, incl conversion/taper/awake). Panels: P105 5W on downlights + uplight wings per ADR0026.
wiring: STANDALONE islands - nothing wired together; runtime = battery Wh / draw (no separate battery derate - chain already battery-side).
runtime_model: runtime = battery-side Wh/day / measured fixture draw. Ben bench: 4W-class RGBW at R=G=B=255,W=0 draws 1.364W battery-side (417mA @3.27V, Jul 14 field cycle); dim ~0.5W (HEX show 158mA measured).
